name: PRUDENTIAL FINANCIAL INC
summary: Prudential Financial, Inc. is a global financial services company with approximately $1.609 trillion in assets under management as of December 31, 2025. Through subsidiaries and affiliates, it offers life insurance, annuities, retirement-related products and services, mutual funds, and investment management. It serves individual and institutional customers via proprietary and third-party distribution networks, operating through PGIM, U.S. Businesses (Retirement Strategies, Group Insurance, Individual Life), International Businesses, and a Closed Block Division.

products.name: Life Insurance
products.description: Individual and group life insurance products offered through U.S. and international businesses.

products.name: Annuities
products.description: Retirement annuity products offered through Retirement Strategies segment.

products.name: Retirement-Related Products and Services
products.description: Products and services supporting retirement planning and income for individuals and institutions.

products.name: Mutual Funds
products.description: Actively managed mutual funds distributed through retail and intermediary channels.

products.name: Investment Management (PGIM)
products.description: Global active investment management across public fixed income, private credit, public equity, real estate, and multi-asset strategies.

products.name: Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs)
products.description: ETFs offered to individual investors and financial intermediaries.

products.name: Separately Managed Accounts
products.description: Customized investment accounts offered to individual investors and financial intermediaries.

products.name: UCITS
products.description: Undertakings for Collective Investment in Transferable Securities offered to intermediaries in Europe, Asia, and Latin America.

products.name: Group Insurance
products.description: Group insurance products offered to institutional and employer customers in the U.S.

products.name: Private Credit and Alternatives
products.description: Alternatives and private credit solutions including direct lending, mezzanine financing, and secondary transactions.

partnerships.description: Co-launched Prismic Life Reinsurance, Ltd., a Bermuda-based life and annuity reinsurance company, in September 2023.
Bermuda-based life and annuity reinsurer launched with Warburg Pincus and institutional investors; Prudential holds ~20% equity interest.
